page_content:
Repeatable to: 4 credits.

HLTH710 Methods and Techniques of Research (3 Credits)

HLTH711 Advanced Research Methods in Health (3 Credits) Quantitative techniques, advanced research methods and design issues. Prerequisite: HLTH710.

Restriction: Must be in MPH: Community Health Education (Master's) program; or must be in Ph.D.: Public and Community Health (Doctoral) program.
